relationship:DIAZOTIZATION; description:L-Thr+NaNO2/HCl(-5℃)→重氮化→NaOH关环氧环→(2R,3R)-环氧丁酸
relationship:ALDOL_REDUCTION; description:环氧丁酸+对甲氧苯胺基乙酸乙酯→缩合→环氧丁酰胺Int-C
relationship:BETA_LACTAM_CYCLIZATION; description:Int-C+HMDS/LiNH2→β-内酰胺关环→中间体D(四元环)
relationship:PROTECTION; description:Int-D→TBSCl/Et3N保护→水解→Baeyer-Villiger氧化→O3脱PMP
relationship:OXIDATION; description:TBS-Int-D→过氧乙酸Baeyer-Villiger氧化→O3脱PMP→4-AA(总收率~34.5%)
relationship:ALDOL_REDUCTION; description:苯甲酰胺+HCHO→羟甲基化→SOCl2氯代→S1/S2(路线B)
relationship:ALDOL_REDUCTION; description:S2+乙酰乙酸甲酯+NaOMe→Claisen缩合→S3
relationship:ENZYME_REDUCTION; description:S3+还原酶(pH6.9,40-50℃,18-22h)→手性醇S4
relationship:OXIDATION; description:S4→TBS保护→乙醇胺→Grignard侧链→过氧乙酸(微反应器)→4-AA(新绿色工艺)
relationship:PROTECTION; description:4-AA+pNB-Br/K2CO3→C3羧基PNB酯保护
relationship:ALDOL_REDUCTION; description:pNB-4-AA→C3酰化→羟醛缩合→手性还原→TBS→4-BMA
relationship:ENOLIZATION; description:4-BMA+LDA/-78℃→烯醇化+ClP(O)(OPh)2→C4烯醇磷酸酯
relationship:METHYLATION; description:EnolP+MeI/MeMgBr→C4 1β-甲基化(DHP-I稳定性关键)
relationship:RH_CYCLIZATION; description:1β-Methyl-EnolP→C4取代→重氮转移→Rh2(OAc)4催化N-H插入→MAP母核
relationship:SIDE_CHAIN_COUPLING; description:MAP母核+吡咯烷硫基C2侧链→脱PNB→美罗培南
relationship:SIDE_CHAIN_COUPLING; description:MAP母核+三唑鎓C2侧链→脱保护→比阿培南
relationship:SIDE_CHAIN_COUPLING; description:MAP母核+氨磺酰吡咯烷C2侧链→脱保护→多尼培南
relationship:SIDE_CHAIN_COUPLING; description:MAP母核+噻唑烷C2侧链→脱保护→Pivoxil酯化→替比培南酯
relationship:SIDE_CHAIN_OF; description:Pivoxil酯化→口服前药
relationship:N_FORMIMIDOYLATION; description:硫霉素+formimidoyl chloride→N-甲酰亚胺化→亚胺培南
relationship:COMBINATION; description:西司他丁+亚胺培南→1:1复方(Tienam/Primaxin)
relationship:SIDE_CHAIN_COUPLING; description:4-AA→C2乙酰亚胺吡咯烷侧链→帕尼培南
relationship:SIDE_CHAIN_COUPLING; description:4-AA→C2间羧基苯甲酰胺侧链→环化→厄他培南(高蛋白结合→长效)
relationship:SIDE_CHAIN_OF; description:间羧基苯甲酰胺侧链→T1/2≈4h QD
relationship:SIDE_CHAIN_OF; description:氨乙基硫C2侧链
relationship:SIDE_CHAIN_OF; description:氨乙基硫C2侧链
relationship:SIDE_CHAIN_OF; description:氨乙基硫C2侧链
relationship:EVOLVED_TO; description:第2代在DHP-I稳定性/抗菌谱/PK特性上迭代升级
